bench_setup.notes: Stage 2 IWDG self-feed test. IWDG1 (D3, 0x58004800) configured with LSI clock (LSION via RCC_CSR, ~32kHz), PR=/256, RLR=0xFF (~2.04s timeout). Feeds watchdog 5× at 200ms intervals, then writes PASS. Verifies: LSI startup, IWDG prescaler, feed path. On FAIL: error_code=0xE001 (LSI never ready). No loopback wiring required.
